ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (opening entry) — 2026-07-19

ARM: E27, contrastive activation addition (CAA, Rimsky et al. arXiv:2503.05213) steering vectors for the local MLX Qwen3 watcher. $0 training (local MLX forward passes only); incidental cap $2. Feasibility already proven on mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit.

HYPOTHESIS: an additive per-layer CAA "fire" vector (mean of steer-token minus NO_STEER-token residual activations over accepted corrections), installed at serve time at one (layer, magnitude, sign), shifts the watcher's sentinel AUC (fire = 1 - P(NO_STEER)) on the 628-row watcher frame.

INSTRUMENT / DECISION RULE (instrument-card-v1): paired DeLong on both arms' persisted per-row probs on the identical 628-row watcher frame (digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0, 335 pos / 293 neg). A delta is ACTIONABLE only if BOTH: (1) paired 95% CI excludes 0, AND (2) |delta| >= paired MDE = 2.8016*SE_delta_paired at the MEASURED rho. Reference paired MDEs: 0.0143 @ rho=0.9, 0.0045 @ rho=0.99. Unpaired card MDE 0.0453. Anything failing either -> "within noise floor", never a win/loss. Promotion (wiring drafter_mlx.patch) is NOT this arm's job — measurement + card verdict only.

PLAN:
1. Extraction (DONE by prior setup): extract_caa.py --n 400 --model mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit -> out/vectors.npz. 400/400 pairs used, 36 layers, hidden 4096, per-layer norms 7.58..1016.4, extract 567.8s. adapter=null (base-model activations).
2. Golden screen (report-only, NO --min-delta): eval_caa.py over layers {8,12,16,20,24} x magnitudes {4,8,16} x signs {+,-} on the 30-row golden watcher-fires set (15 warranted / 15 negative). SCREEN ONLY — 30-row AUC noise floor (~0.15) is far above the card MDE; used solely to pick ONE best config, never to verdict.
3. Full-frame validation: score the 628-row watcher frame base vs steered through the deployment-faithful MlxDrafter path (base Qwen3-8B-4bit + v002 LoRA), persisting per-row probs for BOTH arms. Base arm must reproduce stored v002 probs (E22 proved max|diff|=0.0). Paired fast-DeLong (Sun & Xu 2014): delta, 95% CI, measured rho, paired MDE. Card verdict.

CAVEAT (noted, not a defect): vectors extracted on base-only model (adapter=null); golden screen scores base-only; full-frame scores base+v002 adapter (the deploy path drafter_mlx.patch steers). Steering vector installs on the residual stream regardless. The full-frame paired test is the governing measurement.

Artifacts kept for verify lane: out/vectors.npz (+meta), out/eval_auc.json (golden sweep), out/fullframe_scores.npz + .jsonl (per-row probs BOTH arms), out/fullframe_summary.json. Workspace: repo code read-only from /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-prep (uv run --no-sync); data read-only from _base-20260719 snapshot; outputs under E27/out only.
